title: Upload Benefits Plan Documents
narrative: As a Benefits Administrator, I want to upload benefits plan documents (PDF, Word) so that the AI system can analyze them for requirements and conflicts.
acceptanceCriteria: Can upload PDF or DOCX files up to 25 MB
System validates file type and rejects non-supported formats
Upload progress is visible
Uploaded document appears in the document library with status 'Uploaded'
System begins validation and extraction automatically after upload
Cannot upload more than 10 documents per workspace

title: AI Document Analysis and Requirements Extraction
narrative: As a Benefits Administrator, I want the AI to automatically extract business rules and requirements from uploaded documents so that I do not have to manually read every page.
acceptanceCriteria: AI identifies and lists all extracted business rules with source page reference
Each extracted rule shows the verbatim source text
Extraction completes within 60 seconds for a 50-page PDF
Extracted rules are saved and traceable to source document and page
Rules are categorized (Eligibility, Enrollment, Life Events, etc.)

title: AI Conflict Detection
narrative: As a Benefits Administrator, I want the AI to automatically detect conflicts and ambiguities between extracted rules so that I can resolve them before they cause enrollment errors.
acceptanceCriteria: AI flags rules from different documents that contradict each other
Each conflict shows both conflicting rules with their source references
AI provides a plain-English explanation of the conflict
AI suggests a recommended resolution
Conflicts are listed in a dedicated review queue
Resolved conflicts are tracked with the resolution rationale

title: Interactive AI Requirements Refinement Chat
narrative: As a Benefits Administrator, I want to ask the AI follow-up questions about extracted requirements so that I can clarify ambiguous rules through a conversation rather than re-reading the source documents.
acceptanceCriteria: Chat interface is available within the requirements workspace
AI answers are grounded in the uploaded documents (no hallucination)
AI cites the specific document and page for each answer
Conversation history is preserved within the session
AI can update a requirement based on chat clarification
Clarified requirements are marked with 'AI-assisted' flag

title: Requirements Traceability Report
narrative: As a Benefits Administrator, I want to generate a traceability report showing how each system requirement maps to source documents and business rules so that I can demonstrate compliance during audits.
acceptanceCriteria: Report shows requirement → business rule → source document → page mapping
Report is exportable as PDF or CSV
Broken traceability links (e.g. deleted document) are flagged
Report includes timestamp and document version information
Requirements with no source traceability are highlighted
